introSection:
Volldampf is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Erlebnispark Tripsdrill in Cleebronn, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. It was manufactured by Vekoma. The attraction opened on 26 June 2020. Volldampf is German for Full Steam.

The ride opened alongside a Vekoma Suspended Thrill Coaster named Hals-über-Kopf.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble an steam engine. The last car features a goat holding on the the back of the car.

fullText:
Volldampf is a steel shuttle roller coaster located at Erlebnispark Tripsdrill in Cleebronn, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. It was manufactured by Vekoma. The attraction opened on 26 June 2020. Volldampf is German for Full Steam.

The ride opened alongside a Vekoma Suspended Thrill Coaster named Hals-über-Kopf.



Red track and white supports.

The train is designed to resemble an steam engine. The last car features a goat holding on the the back of the car.
